description_zh: H&M（Hennes & Mauritz）是瑞典最大的全球快时尚服装零售商，1947年由厄林·佩尔松在韦斯特罗斯创立。品牌最初名为「Hennes」（瑞典语意为「她的」），专营女装；1968年收购男装品牌Mauritz后改名为Hennes & Mauritz（H&M）。H&M以「以最优惠的价格提供时尚与品质」为宗旨，将快时尚模式推向全球。品牌拥有强大的设计团队和高效的供应链，从趋势捕捉到门店上架仅需数周。H&M在全球超过70个国家和地区拥有约4500家门店，年营收超2000亿瑞典克朗。品牌以与顶级设计师和奢侈品牌的跨界合作闻名——曾与Karl Lagerfeld、Versace、Balmain、Alexander Wang、Mugler等推出联名系列，每次发布都引发全球排队抢购。近年来H&M也在大力推动可持续发展，推出Conscious系列环保产品，并建立全球旧衣回收计划。

languages.en: H&M (Hennes & Mauritz) is Sweden's largest global fast-fashion retailer, founded in 1947 by Erling Persson in Västerås. Originally named 'Hennes' (Swedish for 'hers'), it sold only women's clothing until acquiring the menswear brand Mauritz in 1968, becoming H&M. The brand's mission is 'fashion and quality at the best price,' driving its fast-fashion model worldwide. With a powerful in-house design team and efficient supply chain, H&M moves from trend identification to store shelves in just weeks. Operating approximately 4,500 stores in over 70 countries with annual revenue exceeding 200 billion SEK, H&M is renowned for its high-profile designer collaborations — partnering with Karl Lagerfeld, Versace, Balmain, Alexander Wang, Mugler, and others, each launch causing global frenzy. In recent years, H&M has heavily invested in sustainability through its Conscious collection and a global garment recycling program.
